patterns: Dispatch dictionary pattern — maps command strings to handler callables for extensible command routing
Standalone handler functions — each command as independent function receiving args, enabling isolation testing
rstrip("\n") for precise newline handling — preserves intentional whitespace in content
Defensive try-except ValueError in remove — handles non-numeric IDs gracefully

atus.title: Implement todo.py with add, list, remove commands
atus.description: Complete implementation of todo.py CLI tool supporting: add (append task to todos.txt), list (display tasks with 1-based IDs, empty output for no tasks), remove (delete by ID, silently ignore invalid IDs). Must handle special characters in task content.

samples.name: sample1
samples.strategy: Dispatch dictionary + standalone handler functions + rstrip(\n)

samples.name: sample2
samples.strategy: if-elif chain + try-except for defensive ID parsing

retainedTraits: Dispatch dictionary pattern — maps command strings to handler callables for extensible command routing
Standalone handler functions — each command (cmd_add, cmd_list, cmd_remove) is an independent function receiving args
rstrip("\n") for precise newline handling — preserves intentional whitespace in task content
Defensive try-except ValueError in cmd_remove — handles non-numeric IDs gracefully with error message
